visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a black and white patterned jacket with orange accents, bright red pants, a black helmet, and reflective goggles is seen sitting on a pristine snowy slope. He uses his hands to push himself up and stands on a snowboard. The environment is an expansive ski resort with several other people sitting on the snow in the mid-ground. (2) The man begins to snowboard down the slope. The camera follows him from behind, capturing the wide, well-groomed trail. The background features distant snow-covered mountains and sparse trees under a bright blue sky with wispy white clouds. The lighting is bright and natural, coming from the upper right. (3) The snowboarder continues his descent, performing controlled turns. Other skiers and snowboarders are visible in the distance, moving at various speeds. The camera remains in a handheld follow-shot style, maintaining a medium full shot of the main character. (4) Towards the end of the video, the man intentionally falls backward onto the snow, lying flat with his arms outstretched, smiling broadly. He then sits up on the snow, looks directly into the lens, and gives a confident thumbs-up while shouting with joy.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 蔡阿嘎雪齡8小時。成果驗收

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main character snowboarding, at least 11 other figures visible in the background and on the slopes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male wearing a patterned black, white, and orange jacket, vibrant red snow pants, a black helmet, and snowboarding goggles.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A wide, open ski slope covered in white snow, surrounded by mountains and distant trees under a clear blue sky.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a burst of high-energy male vocalization and a sharp, percussive sliding sound as the board meets the snow. An upbeat, major-key pop track with a heavy drum beat and bright synthesizers begins immediately. (2) As the boarding sequence continues, the consistent low-frequency rumble of wind hitting the microphone and the friction sound of the board on the snow are layered under the BGM. The male voice lets out occasional high-pitched shouts of excitement. (3) The BGM continues with a driving 4/4 rhythm. The sound of the board sliding across the snow changes in pitch and texture during turns, creating a rhythmic scraping effect. (4) The sliding sounds culminate in a final heavy crunch. The male voice becomes much louder and more articulated, expressing intense joy and achievement with a high-pitched laugh. The music maintains its energetic tempo until a hard cut at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video documents a creator's progress in learning to snowboard, showcasing their ability to handle turns on a slope after eight hours of practice, concluding with a celebratory fall and a thumbs-up to share the sense of achievement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-arousal sports content with positive emotional valence, likely aimed at a lifestyle or travel audience interested in snowboarding.
